testcase.name: test_create_invoice_with_gst

failure.message: AssertionError: No entry ID from create test assert None

testcase.name: test_verify_gst_settings_persisted

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected gst_applicable True, got None assert None == True + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86c7fa17ac0>('gst_applicable') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86c7fa17ac0> = {'booked_value': 0, 'budget': None, 'client_address': None, 'client_email': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_gst_purchase_invoices.py:273: in test_verify_gst_settings_persisted assert data.get("gst_applicable") == True, f"Expected gst_applicable True, got {data.get('gst_applicable')}" E AssertionError: Expected gst_applicable True, got None E assert None == True E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86c7fa17ac0>('gst_applicable') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86c7fa17ac0> = {'booked_value': 0, 'budget': None, 'client_address': None, 'client_email': None, ...}.get

testcase.name: test_disable_gst_toggle

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected gst_applicable False, got None assert None == False + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86c7fa2a040>('gst_applicable') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86c7fa2a040> = {'booked_value': 0, 'budget': None, 'client_address': None, 'client_email': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_gst_purchase_invoices.py:305: in test_disable_gst_toggle assert data.get("gst_applicable") == False, f"Expected gst_applicable False, got {data.get('gst_applicable')}" E AssertionError: Expected gst_applicable False, got None E assert None == False E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86c7fa2a040>('gst_applicable') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86c7fa2a040> = {'booked_value': 0, 'budget': None, 'client_address': None, 'client_email': None, ...}.get
